parameters.query: INSERT INTO seo_kws.clients (slug, name) VALUES ('{{ $json.client }}', '{{ $json.client_name }}') ON CONFLICT (slug) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name RETURNING id

INSERT INTO seo_kws.jobs (client_id, name, lang, country, num_results, total_keywords, status) VALUES ({{ $("Upsert Client").first().json.id }}, '{{ $("Validate").first().json.job_name }}', '{{ $("Validate").first().json.lang }}', '{{ $("Validate").first().json.country }}', {{ $("Validate").first().json.num }}, {{ $("Validate").first().json.keyword_count }}, 'pending') RETURNING id

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ job_id: $('Prepare Tasks').first().json.job_id, task_count: $('Prepare Tasks').first().json.task_count, client_id: $('Prepare Tasks').first().json.client_id, status: 'queued' }) }}
